title: XYZ: Backrooms
body:
![Backrooms xyz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0faa0ddfc9353946beec9ed179048fdee39602f.png)
Bringing the Backrooms to Minecraft
![Compatibility](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devvyyxyz/abc-site@main/assets/images/titles/Compatibility.png) - All packs that do not overwrite the vanilla textures | Item / Block | Description | |--------------------------------|----------------------| | **Info** | | | Shader compatible | ✔️ | | Custom models | ✔️ | | Pre-build map included | ✔️ | | 10+ levels | ✔️ | | Completely free | ✔️ | | Backrooms themed textures | ✔️ | | **Wallpapers** | | | Andesite | Green Wallpaper | | Blackstone | Cloud Wallpaper | | Oak Log | Yellow Wallpaper | | **Tiles** | | | Granite | Red Tiles | | Prismarine | Blue Tiles | | Quartz (all forms) | White Tiles | | **Carpets** | | | Oak Planks (Top Texture) | Carpet | | **Lights** | | | Glowstone | White Light | | Emerald Block | Yellow Light | | Lapis Block | Red Light | | Polished Deepslate | Dark Blue Light |
Misc - VHS overlay (Carved pumpkin)
### Game footage ![Credits](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devvyyxyz/abc-site@main/assets/images/titles/Credits.png) _By **ceruleanblue**, **[devvyyxyz](https://modrinth.com/user/devvyyxyz)** and **roystbit** Huge thanks to **[Teamchar1ie](https://modrinth.com/user/TChar1ie)** for the basic poolroom tiles, without him i probably would not have started this project. Check out his pack "Charlie's Backrooms" Huge thanks also to **Valentin Ibarren**, and his game **Dreamcore**: most of the poolrooms textures are inspired from his fantastic game Dreamcore! Check it out on steam! [here](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2453060/Dreamcore/) Check out our discord too, where we post updates and things related to the pack [here](https://discord.gg/ncaQhsYEjN)_
